name: job-aggregator
description: Full-stack job aggregator and scraper monorepo.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @job-aggregator/shared && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/parsers && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/notifier && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/database && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/scraper-core && npm run build -w apps-scraper && npm run build -w apps-worker && npm run build -w apps-dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @job-aggregator/shared && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/parsers && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/notifier && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/database && npm run build -w @job-aggregator/scraper-core && npm run typecheck -w apps-scraper && npm run typecheck -w apps-worker && npm run typecheck -w apps-dashboard
